item.title: R K Swamy Ltd Falls 3.40% Amidst Prolonged Downtrend and Sector Pressure
item.description: R K Swamy Ltd’s shares declined by 3.40% over the week ending 13 Mar 2026, closing at Rs.95.16, underperforming the Sensex which fell 4.87%. The stock hit both a 52-week low and an all-time low on 09 Mar 2026, reflecting ongoing challenges amid a prolonged downtrend and sector-wide pressures in the Media & Entertainment industry. Time: 51 minutes ago

item.title: Indegene Ltd Falls 6.60% Amidst Prolonged Downtrend and Market Weakness
item.description: Indegene Ltd’s stock endured a challenging week from 9 to 13 March 2026, declining 6.60% to close at Rs.429.05, underperforming the Sensex which fell 4.87%. The stock hit fresh 52-week and all-time lows multiple times amid sustained bearish momentum, despite the company reporting record quarterly sales and profits. This review analyses the key events and market dynamics shaping the stock’s performance over the week. Time: 51 minutes ago

item.title: AWFIS Space Solutions Ltd Gains 1.45%: 2 Key Events Shaping the Week
item.description: AWFIS Space Solutions Ltd closed the week with a modest gain of 1.45%, ending at Rs.269.85 on 13 March 2026, despite a sharply declining Sensex which fell 4.87% over the same period. The stock’s performance was marked by significant volatility, including a 52-week low on 9 March and a strong intraday surge on 11 March, reflecting mixed investor sentiment amid broader market weakness and sectoral pressures. Time: 51 minutes ago

item.title: Borosil Scientific Ltd Gains 0.53%: 5 Key Factors Driving the Week's Movement
item.description: Borosil Scientific Ltd closed the week ending 13 March 2026 with a modest gain of 0.53%, outperforming the Sensex which fell 4.87% over the same period. The stock showed resilience amid a volatile market, hitting a fresh 52-week and all-time low early in the week before recovering slightly. Despite the broader market downturn and sectoral pressures, Borosil’s price movements reflected a complex interplay of company-specific developments and market sentiment. Time: 51 minutes ago

item.title: Kronox Lab Sciences Ltd Declines 1.01%: 4 Key Events Shaping the Week
item.description: Kronox Lab Sciences Ltd’s stock experienced a turbulent week from 9 to 13 March 2026, closing marginally lower by 1.01% at Rs.113.15 despite a volatile trading environment. The stock notably outperformed the Sensex, which fell sharply by 4.87% over the same period, reflecting relative resilience amid broad market weakness. Key events including fresh 52-week and all-time lows, intraday volatility, and sector pressures shaped the stock’s performance throughout the week. Time: 51 minutes ago

item.title: Forbes Precision Tools Drops 4.95%: 2 Key Lows Mark a Challenging Week
item.description: Forbes Precision Tools & Machine Parts Ltd experienced a challenging week ending 13 March 2026, with its stock price declining 4.95% to close at Rs.119.15, marginally outperforming the Sensex which fell 4.87%. The stock hit a new 52-week and all-time low during the week, reflecting ongoing financial pressures and bearish technical signals amid a broadly negative market environment. Time: 52 minutes ago

item.title: Adtech Systems Ltd Gains 6.15% Despite Market Downturn: 4 Key Factors Driving the Move
item.description: Adtech Systems Ltd’s shares advanced 6.15% over the week ending 13 Mar 2026, closing at Rs.53.99 from Rs.50.86, outperforming the Sensex which declined 4.87% during the same period. The stock’s recovery followed a challenging start marked by a fresh 52-week and all-time low on 09 Mar, before regaining ground amid mixed market conditions and company-specific developments. Time: 52 minutes ago

item.title: DEE Development Engineers Ltd Gains 6.82%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Week
item.description: DEE Development Engineers Ltd delivered a strong weekly performance, rising 6.82% from Rs.278.50 to Rs.297.50 between 09 and 13 March 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined 4.87% over the same period. The stock’s resilience amid a broadly negative market was driven by a remarkable intraday surge and upper circuit hit on 09 March, followed by mixed technical signals amid sustained price momentum. This review analyses the key events shaping the stock’s trajectory and their impact on investor sentiment. Time: 52 minutes ago

item.title: Akme Fintrade Gains 3.18% Amid Volatile Week: 7 Key Events Shaping the Stock
item.description: Akme Fintrade (India) Ltd delivered a mixed but resilient performance during the week ending 13 March 2026, closing with a 3.18% gain to ₹7.78 despite a sharply declining Sensex which fell 4.87%. The stock exhibited strong intraday momentum with multiple upper circuit hits from 9 to 12 March, signalling intense buying interest amid sector headwinds. However, the week ended on a volatile note with a lower circuit hit on 13 March, reflecting profit-taking and selling pressure. This review analyses the key events shaping the stock’s price action and underlying fundamentals over the week. Time: 52 minutes ago

item.title: Emcure Pharmaceuticals Gains 1.58%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Momentum
item.description: Emcure Pharmaceuticals Ltd closed the week ending 13 March 2026 with a modest gain of 1.58%, outperforming the Sensex which declined 4.87% over the same period. The stock demonstrated resilience amid a broadly negative market environment, buoyed by strong intraday rallies, an upgrade to a Buy rating by MarketsMOJO, and a nuanced shift in technical momentum signalling a cautiously optimistic outlook. Time: 52 minutes ago

item.title: Bansal Wire Industries Ltd Falls 4.60%: 3 Key Factors Behind the Downtrend
item.description: Bansal Wire Industries Ltd’s stock declined by 4.60% over the week ending 13 March 2026, closing at Rs.239.60 from Rs.251.15 the previous Friday. This underperformance was marginally better than the Sensex’s 4.87% fall during the same period, reflecting persistent sectoral and market headwinds. The week was marked by fresh 52-week and all-time lows, elevated volatility, and sustained bearish technical signals, underscoring ongoing challenges for the company amid a weak iron and steel products sector. Time: 52 minutes ago

item.title: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd Falls 3.91%: 6 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Downtrend
item.description: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd’s shares declined by 3.91% over the week ending 13 March 2026, closing at Rs.23.10 from Rs.24.04. This underperformance was slightly less severe than the Sensex’s 4.87% fall, reflecting persistent selling pressure amid high trading volumes and bearish technical signals. The stock hit a fresh 52-week low early in the week and despite intermittent volume-driven rallies, it remained below all key moving averages throughout, signalling ongoing weakness in the electric mobility sector. Time: 52 minutes ago

item.title: Afcom Holdings Ltd Falls 8.09%: 4 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Afcom Holdings Ltd’s shares declined by 8.09% over the week ending 13 March 2026, underperforming the Sensex which fell 4.87%. The stock faced sustained selling pressure, hitting intraday lows early in the week before a brief rebound midweek. Despite a late-session recovery on 13 March, the overall sentiment remained bearish amid technical downgrades and sectoral headwinds. Time: 52 minutes ago

item.title: Orient Technologies Ltd’s Volatile Week: 0.54% Gain Amidst Technical Shifts and Market Pressure
item.description: Orient Technologies Ltd closed the week marginally higher by 0.54%, ending at Rs.271.85 on 13 Mar 2026, despite a turbulent trading week marked by sharp intraday swings and a broader market decline. The Sensex, in contrast, fell sharply by 4.87% over the same period, underscoring the stock’s relative resilience amid sectoral and market headwinds. Time: 52 minutes ago

item.title: Premier Energies Ltd Gains 8.19%: 2 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Rally
item.description: Premier Energies Ltd delivered a robust weekly performance, rising 8.19% from Rs.722.95 to Rs.782.15 between 9 and 13 March 2026, significantly outperforming the Sensex which declined 4.87% over the same period. The stock’s gains were driven by strong intraday momentum midweek, despite a broadly bearish market environment, reflecting a complex technical landscape and selective buying interest. Time: 53 minutes ago

item.title: Ecos (India) Mobility & Hospitality Ltd Falls 3.92%: 3 Key Factors Behind the Weekly Decline
item.description: Ecos (India) Mobility & Hospitality Ltd’s stock declined by 3.92% over the week ending 13 March 2026, closing at Rs.126.30 from Rs.131.45. Despite the negative price movement, the stock outperformed the Sensex, which fell 4.87% during the same period. The week was marked by a fresh 52-week and all-time low, followed by valuation improvements signalling renewed price attractiveness amid ongoing market challenges. Time: 53 minutes ago

item.title: Raymond Lifestyle Ltd Falls 6.98%: 7 Key Factors Driving the Downtrend
item.description: Raymond Lifestyle Ltd’s stock endured a challenging week from 9 to 13 March 2026, declining 6.98% from Rs.808.40 to Rs.751.95, underperforming the Sensex’s 4.87% fall over the same period. The stock repeatedly hit new 52-week and all-time lows amid persistent fundamental weaknesses and bearish technical signals, despite some positive quarterly results and increased promoter shareholding. This review analyses the key events and market dynamics shaping the stock’s performance during the week. Time: 53 minutes ago

item.title: Northern ARC Capital Ltd Falls 7.80%: 3 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Northern ARC Capital Ltd experienced a challenging week from 9 to 13 March 2026, with its share price declining by 7.80% to close at Rs.221.15, despite the broader Sensex falling 4.87%. The stock showed volatility amid shifting technical momentum, a downgrade in its investment rating, and mixed market signals, reflecting a complex environment for this NBFC amid sectoral pressures. Time: 53 minutes ago

item.title: Arkade Developers Ltd Falls 5.48%: Key Technical and Market Pressures Shape the Week
item.description: Arkade Developers Ltd’s stock declined by 5.48% over the week ending 13 March 2026, closing at Rs.104.45 from Rs.110.50. This underperformance slightly exceeded the Sensex’s 4.87% drop, reflecting persistent bearish momentum amid sectoral headwinds and deteriorating technical indicators. The stock hit fresh 52-week and all-time lows during the week, underscoring ongoing challenges in the realty sector and subdued investor sentiment. Time: 53 minutes ago

item.title: Manba Finance Ltd Gains 2.61%: 4 Key Factors Driving the Week’s Volatility
item.description: Manba Finance Ltd’s shares experienced a turbulent week from 9 to 13 March 2026, ultimately gaining 2.61% despite a challenging market backdrop. The stock’s performance contrasted sharply with the broader Sensex, which declined 4.87% over the same period. Key events included a fresh 52-week and all-time low on 9 March, followed by an upgrade in rating and valuation improvements midweek, culminating in a strong rebound on the final trading day. Time: 53 minutes ago
